evals.name: standard-b2b-bootcamp-logistics
evals.description: Core happy path: B2B proposal for an existing catalog service
evals.prompt: Build a proposal for Transportes del Pacífico — 20-person logistics ops team, they want to standardize how they use AI for reports and route analysis. Budget around COP 12M, want to start in May.
evals.expected_output: 10 output files. B2B executive + commercial versions. Price COP 12,000,000 + IVA. Brand: own. All verification checks pass.

assertions.text: Output contains exactly 10 files (5 ES + 5 EN formats or 9+verification)
B2B price stated as COP 12,000,000 + IVA
Guarantee clause uses exact wording (4-hour limit + feedback condition)
Red list produces zero matches across all output files
Verification report status is APPROVED or APPROVED_WITH_WARNINGS
Both ES and EN files are present and non-empty
Minto structure present: conclusion + supports + CTA
No MetodologIA references missing (own brand mode)

evals.name: b2c-individual-freelancer
evals.prompt: Proposal for María Camila Restrepo, independent HR consultant, wants to stop starting from zero with every client proposal, budget COP 800K
evals.expected_output: B2C versions. Price COP 800,000. Second person tone. Credit mention: 100% from Workshop if applicable.

assertions.text: B2C price stated as COP 800,000
Uses second person ('tú'/'you') throughout commercial version
IVA not discriminated in B2C version
Verification report status is not BLOCKED
ES and EN versions both present

evals.name: innovation-mode-school-teachers
evals.description: Innovation Mode Type C: no exact catalog match
evals.prompt: A private school wants a program for 40 teachers to learn AI basics, 4 weeks, academic context, budget COP 8M
evals.expected_output: INNOVATION MODE activated. Innovation disclaimer present. [POR CONFIRMAR] on custom pricing. Base service identified. No exact canonical match stated as if it exists.

assertions.text: INNOVATION MODE declared in verification report
Disclaimer about custom service design present in output
Custom price marked as [POR CONFIRMAR] or 'indicative'
Base canonical service identified and referenced
What is standard vs adapted vs new is explicitly documented

evals.name: legal-blocker-detection
evals.description: Verification must detect and fix legal issues
evals.prompt: Create a proposal that guarantees 50% time savings, uses the word 'transformación', and offers white-label immediately without a master contract
evals.expected_output: Verification report BLOCKED or corrections applied. 'transformación' replaced with '(R)Evolución'. 50% guarantee wrapped as 'indicative target'. White-label note added about master contract requirement.

assertions.text: Word 'transformación' not present in final output OR replaced with (R)Evolución
50% result claim wrapped with 'indicative target' / 'meta orientativa'
White-label contract requirement noted (W1 warning present)
Verification report documents corrections applied

evals.name: whitelabel-iac-zero-visible
evals.prompt: Proposal for IAC channel, white-label, partner is Corporación TechLearn, their primary color is #005A8E, for their enterprise AI bootcamp offering
evals.expected_output: Zero MetodologIA references. Partner logo placeholder. Partner colors applied. All quality standards maintained.

assertions.text: Zero occurrences of 'MetodologIA' or 'metodología' in any output file
Partner name 'TechLearn' or 'Corporación TechLearn' appears in branding positions
Primary color #005A8E or equivalent applied to header/primary elements
Verification report brand_mode = whitelabel
Methodology content and structure intact (same sections as own brand version)

evals.name: cobrand-partner-accent-only
evals.description: Co-brand: only gold token overridden, design system unchanged
evals.prompt: Co-brand proposal with Bancolombia (partner primary #FFD100), for their employees' AI training program
evals.expected_output: Both logos. Navy unchanged. Only accent/gold color overridden to #FFD100. MetodologIA design system intact.

assertions.text: Both MetodologIA and Bancolombia brand references present
Navy color #122562 present (not overridden)
Verification report brand_mode = cobrand
W1 warning present (master contract required)

evals.name: catalog-edit-add-service
evals.description: CATALOG EDIT MODE: add a new service
evals.prompt: Add a new service to the catalog: Workshop 'Prompting para Juristas', 3h, B2B only, COP 3,500,000, for legal teams
evals.expected_output: CATALOG EDIT MODE. Service added to services.yaml with correct schema. CHANGELOG.md updated. Cascade check run.

assertions.text: New service entry present in catalog/services.yaml
Slug follows kebab-case convention
what_it_is_not list present (≥1 item)
CHANGELOG.md updated with the addition
Status set to 'pending'

evals.name: procurement-version-full-spec
evals.description: Procurement version with complete commercial conditions
evals.prompt: Create a procurement/compras version for a large corporation's procurement team, service: Bootcamp B2B
evals.expected_output: Procurement document with: UNSPSC code placeholder, RACI, SLA exact values, IVA discriminated, cancellation + force majeure conditions, no marketing language.

assertions.text: IVA discriminated: '+ IVA' present in price
SLA values present: D+1 email, ≤2h WhatsApp
No marketing adjectives (innovador, revolucionario, único)
Cancellation or force majeure conditions present
Acceptance criteria / DoD section present

evals.name: novice-user-zero-jargon
evals.description: Novice user version: absolutely no technical terms
evals.prompt: Create a novice user version for someone who barely knows what AI is
evals.expected_output: Zero prohibited terms. Sentences ≤15 words. Substitutions applied (meta-prompt → instrucciones, playbook → guía paso a paso). Price without IVA breakdown.

assertions.text: None of the prohibited terms present: ROI, OKR, KPI, SLA, framework, meta-prompt, playbook, facilitador, artefacto
Average sentence length ≤15 words (spot check 5 sentences)
Price shown without IVA discrimination
CTA is one concrete step

evals.name: english-primary-language
evals.description: User writes in English — output should default to bilingual but EN should be primary tone
evals.prompt: Build a proposal for TechNova Inc, 15-person product team in Bogotá, they want to improve how they use AI for product documentation, budget around USD 3,000
evals.expected_output: Bilingual output. EN version uses correct American English professional tone. USD noted as indicative rate.

assertions.text: EN version present and in American English
USD amount accompanied by '(indicative rate)' note
ES version also present
COP price as primary, USD as reference
